certificate.sansSectionSubtitle: Every hostname this certificate is valid for in TLS (primary name and aliases).

confirm.title: Delete Certificate
confirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete the certificate for domain "{{domain}}"? This will only delete the database record and will not affect the acme.json file.

update.autoNotEditable: Auto source certificates cannot be manually updated. Please re-apply instead.

sansChanged.banner: SAN list was edited: the PEM on file may still match the old hostname set. Use Re-apply so the CA issues against the current record; saving SANs alone does not change the issued certificate.

reapply.title: Re-apply Certificate
reapply.confirmDetail: The server loads domain, contact email, and SANs from the database. Only “force renewal” below controls whether cached certs are skipped and the CA is asked to re-issue.
reapply.forceRenewal: Force renewal (ignore cache; re-issue even if not expired — may hit CA rate limits)
reapply.emailRequired: This certificate has no contact email. Add one on the edit page or use Add Certificate.
reapply.notLoaded: Certificate is still loading. Please try again.
